Code CHAR 1 A code designating the version of the assessment. C = Current, M = Modified, X = Inactive
5 CLCDAGTX CALCTD_AGE_TXT Calculated Age Code CHAR 5 A preliminary calculation made prior to determining the CMG group. Age is computed on the basis of the difference between the Admission Date (Item 12) and the Birth Date (Item 6).
6 CLCCMGTX CALCTD_CMG_TXT Calculated CMG Code CHAR 10 The Case-Mix Group code that is calculated from the data submitted to the NACD.
7 CLCMVRTX CALCTD_CMG_VRSN_TXT
